issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-crashlytics than 20.0.6 is available: 20.1.0
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.13.1 is available: 1.19.0
issue.errorLine1: implementation("androidx.core:core-ktx:1.13.1") // # stable, for Liar API: Fatal Exception: java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: No virtual method getRoundedCorner(I)Landroid/view/RoundedCorner; in class Landroid/view/Display

issue.message: A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.13.1 is available: 1.19.0
issue.errorLine1: implementation("androidx.core:core-ktx:1.13.1") // # stable, for Liar API: Fatal Exception: java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: No virtual method getRoundedCorner(I)Landroid/view/RoundedCorner; in class Landroid/view/Display

issue.message: Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
This formatting string is trivial. Rather than using `String.format` to create your String, it will be more performant to concatenate your arguments with `+`.
This formatting string is trivial. Rather than using `String.format` to create your String, it will be more performant to concatenate your arguments with `+`.
issue.errorLine1: String logMessage = String.format("%s [%s] %s", timestamp, tag, message);

issue.message: Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
The resource `R.string.fragment_quotations_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.fragment_quotations_selection_all_ascending` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.fragment_quotations_selection_all_ascending_info` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fragment_quotations_selection_all_ascending_info">\u2022  Start with the Source with the least quotations; end with the Source with the most; any existing Previous is preserved</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.fragment_appearance_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.fragment_notifications_exact_alarm_warning_info` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.fragment_archive_restore_onto_new_device` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.fragment_archive_restore_onto_new_device_info` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fragment_archive_restore_onto_new_device_info">\u2022  Keeping \'old instance data\' only required if using multiple instances of the app widget on the same device</string>

issue.message: Access to `private` method `loadFragment` of class `QuotationsContentFragment` requires synthetic accessor
This `RadioGroup` layout or its `LinearLayout` parent is possibly unnecessary
This `LinearLayout` layout or its `LinearLayout` parent is unnecessary; transfer the `background` attribute to the other view
Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="activity_instructions_configure_4">L\'icone \u2316, à coté de l\'indicateur de position de la Citation, indique la dernière précédente Citation</string>

issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?
Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?
Replace straight quotes ('') with directional quotes (‘’, ‘ and ’) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fragment_archive_restore_onto_new_device_info">\u2022  Keeping \'old instance data\' only required if using multiple instances of the app widget on the same device</string>

issue.message: Replace apostrophe (') with typographic apostrophe (’, ’) ?
Hardcoded string "1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Quotation", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Source", should use `@string` resource
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
